metadata.scheme_name: Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges

raw_data.details: The “Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges” was implemented by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat. It aims to encourage higher education by providing financial support to meritorious students in government colleges. Under this scheme, students of Science, Commerce, and Arts streams receive annual scholarships to pursue higher education.
raw_data.benefits: Scholarships are provided to students:Science stream: ₹3,000 per annum. Commerce stream: ₹2,000 per annum. Arts stream: ₹1,000 per annum.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Gujarat state. The applicant must be a student. The applicant must be studying in a government college in Gujarat. The applicant must be pursuing higher education in Arts, Commerce, or Science stream. The applicant must have passed the Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) examination. The applicant should have secured a rank in the first, second, or third position at the university level in Arts, Commerce, or Science.
raw_data.application_process:
OnlineApplication Process:
Step 1: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal: [https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/)
Step 2: On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page.
Step 3: Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’.
Step 4: After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password.
Step 5: Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information.
Step 6: After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP).
Step 7: Now under services, select ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’.
Step 8: Select the Financial Year for which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’.
Step 9: Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’.
Step 10: Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents.
Step 11: Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’. Instructions: Note 1: Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory. Note 2: Application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed. Note 3: Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for a scholarship. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her all applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained. Note 4: In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities. Note 5: All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given. Note 6: The student has to fill his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully. Note 7: The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject the student application. Note 8: Direct Individual submission of this application form will not be accepted in case of students studying inside the state. Only outside students have to fill out their form online and submit his/her application form to their native district officer.[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/User_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- English[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/GUser_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- Gujarati
raw_data.documents_required: Graduate MarksheetHSC Pass CertificateAny Other Document if Required

To know more please visit Check EligibilityGujaratScholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges ArtsCollegeCommerceHigher EducationScholarshipScienceStudentDetailsThe “Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges” was implemented by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat. It aims to encourage higher education by providing financial support to meritorious students in government colleges. Under this scheme, students of Science, Commerce, and Arts streams receive annual scholarships to pursue higher education. BenefitsScholarships are provided to students:Science stream: ₹3,000 per annum. Commerce stream: ₹2,000 per annum. Arts stream: ₹1,000 per annum. EligibilityThe applicant must be a resident of Gujarat state. The applicant must be a student. The applicant must be studying in a government college in Gujarat. The applicant must be pursuing higher education in Arts, Commerce, or Science stream. The applicant must have passed the Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) examination. The applicant should have secured a rank in the first, second, or third position at the university level in Arts, Commerce, or Science. Application ProcessOnlineApplication Process:Step 1: The applicant may visit the Digital Gujarat Portal: [https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/)Step 2: On the home page, click on ‘Register’ and the applicant will be redirected to the registration form page. Step 3: Enter your Mobile Number, Email, Set Password, and then click on ‘Save’. Step 4: After successful registration, the applicant can login through his/her User Name (Mobile No./Email ID) and Password. Step 5: Now, click on ‘My Profile’ to update your profile and fill in all the mandatory information. Step 6: After filling in profile details, click on ‘Update Profile’. The profile will be updated after entering the verification Code (OTP). Step 7: Now under services, select ‘Scholarship Services’ and then click on ‘SC Scheme’. Step 8: Select the Financial Year for which you want to apply for and then click on ‘Change Financial Year’. Step 9: Select the scheme, read the interaction carefully, and then click on ‘Continue to Service’. Step 10: Fill in the application form completely and upload all the relevant documents. Step 11: Now, click on ‘Save as Draft’ and agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the application form by clicking on ‘Confirm & Final Submit’. Instructions: Note 1: Photo uploading for all applicants is mandatory. Note 2: Application will be considered complete only when all sections are completed. Note 3: Only one application per applicant will be acceptable for a scholarship. If any student submits more than one application either from a single institute or from multiple institutions his/her all applications will be rejected by the competent authority and no request from any side will be entertained. Note 4: In case of any wrong/misleading information provided in the application shall lead to rejection of the application by Department Authorities. Note 5: All required documents must be carefully scanned as per the instructions given. Note 6: The student has to fill his/her application carefully as there is no provision for institution change once the application is submitted successfully. Note 7: The unreadable uploaded documents will allow the competent authority to reject the student application. Note 8: Direct Individual submission of this application form will not be accepted in case of students studying inside the state. Only outside students have to fill out their form online and submit his/her application form to their native district officer.[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/User_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- English[User Manual](https://www.digitalgujarat.gov.in/loginapp/Download/GUser_Manual_on_CSP_v1. 1.pdf)- GujaratiDocuments RequiredGraduate MarksheetHSC Pass CertificateAny Other Document if RequiredFrequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible for this scholarship? Students studying in Arts, Commerce, or Science streams in government colleges in Gujarat. How much scholarship is given? ₹3,000 for Science students, ₹2,000 for Commerce students, and ₹1,000 for Arts students. Is this scheme applicable for private college students? No, it is only for government college students. Do I need to pay for the application form? No, the application is free of cost. Can students of all categories apply? Yes, it is open to all categories. Is there any income limit? No, there is no income limit under this scheme. What is the main objective of this scheme? To support meritorious students and promote higher education. Is there any requirement for minimum marks? Yes, the student must secure top positions (first, second, or third) at the university level. Is this scheme applicable across Gujarat? Yes, it is applicable across all government colleges in the state. Is this scheme available for students from all states? No, this scheme is only for permanent residents of Gujarat. Sources And References[Guidelines](https://mariyojana.gujarat.gov.in/Schemeatoz.aspx)OkWas this helpful?
raw_data.scheme_name: Scholarship Scheme for Students Studying in Government Colleges

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students studying in Arts, Commerce, or Science streams in government colleges in Gujarat.

faqs.question: How much scholarship is given?
faqs.answer: ₹3,000 for Science students, ₹2,000 for Commerce students, and ₹1,000 for Arts students.

faqs.question: Is this scheme applicable for private college students?
faqs.answer: No, it is only for government college students.

faqs.question: Do I need to pay for the application form?
faqs.answer: No, the application is free of cost.

faqs.question: Can students of all categories apply?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is open to all categories.

faqs.question: Is there any income limit?
faqs.answer: No, there is no income limit under this scheme.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of this scheme?
faqs.answer: To support meritorious students and promote higher education.

faqs.question: Is there any requirement for minimum marks?
faqs.answer: Yes, the student must secure top positions (first, second, or third) at the university level.

faqs.question: Is this scheme applicable across Gujarat?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is applicable across all government colleges in the state.

faqs.question: Is this scheme available for students from all states?
faqs.answer: No, this scheme is only for permanent residents of Gujarat.
